feed.title: Intelligent and Sustainable Edge Computing (I-SEC) Lab
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Congratulations! Mohsen Hatami Passed His Ph.D. Prospectus Exam

link.title: Congratulations! Mohsen Hatami Passed His Ph.D. Prospectus Exam

entry.content: :fireworks: :sparkles: :smile: Congratulations to Mohsen Hatami, who successfully passed his Ph.D. prospectus exam on May 18, 2026 — which also happened to be his birthday. A memorable day, and one step closer to the Ph.D.!
entry.summary: :fireworks: :sparkles: :smile: Congratulations to Mohsen Hatami, who successfully passed his Ph.D. prospectus exam on May 18, 2026 — which also happened to be his birthday. A memorable day, and one step closer to the Ph.D.!

entry.title: Dr. Chen Delivers Keynote at 2026 NSF Workshop on Research Data Management in Construction Engineering

link.title: Dr. Chen Delivers Keynote at 2026 NSF Workshop on Research Data Management in Construction Engineering

entry.content: :fireworks: :sparkles: Dr. Chen delivered the keynote at the 2026 NSF Workshop on Research Data Management in Construction Engineering, hosted by Michigan Technological University.
entry.summary: :fireworks: :sparkles: Dr. Chen delivered the keynote at the 2026 NSF Workshop on Research Data Management in Construction Engineering, hosted by Michigan Technological University.

entry.title: Dr. Chen Serves as Invited Panelist at SPIE Defense + Security 2026

link.title: Dr. Chen Serves as Invited Panelist at SPIE Defense + Security 2026

entry.content: :fireworks: Dr. Chen served as an invited panelist on Information Fusion for Health Monitoring at SPIE Defense + Security 2026.
entry.summary: :fireworks: Dr. Chen served as an invited panelist on Information Fusion for Health Monitoring at SPIE Defense + Security 2026.

entry.title: Dr. Chen Receives 2025–26 Watson College Recognition Award for Outstanding Research Achievement

link.title: Dr. Chen Receives 2025–26 Watson College Recognition Award for Outstanding Research Achievement

entry.content: :fireworks: :sparkles: Dr. Chen has been selected as a recipient of the 2025–26 Watson College Recognition Award for Outstanding Research Achievement, announced at the Spring 2026 Watson College Awards Luncheon. Congratulations!
entry.summary: :fireworks: :sparkles: Dr. Chen has been selected as a recipient of the 2025–26 Watson College Recognition Award for Outstanding Research Achievement, announced at the Spring 2026 Watson College Awards Luncheon. Congratulations!

entry.title: Lab Receives NSF ART EXCEED STRP Award Supporting CerVaLens

link.title: Lab Receives NSF ART EXCEED STRP Award Supporting CerVaLens

entry.content: :fireworks: The lab has received an NSF ART EXCEED STRP award supporting the CerVaLens project, with Dr. Chen as PI. Congratulations to the team!
entry.summary: :fireworks: The lab has received an NSF ART EXCEED STRP award supporting the CerVaLens project, with Dr. Chen as PI. Congratulations to the team!

entry.title: Dr. Chen Awarded Watson Seed Grant for Multi-Modal Physical Authentication

link.title: Dr. Chen Awarded Watson Seed Grant for Multi-Modal Physical Authentication

entry.content: :fireworks: Dr. Chen has been awarded a Watson Seed Grant for research on Multi-Modal Physical Authentication. Congratulations!
entry.summary: :fireworks: Dr. Chen has been awarded a Watson Seed Grant for research on Multi-Modal Physical Authentication. Congratulations!

entry.title: Congratulations Dr. Simeon Ogunbunmi — Ph.D. Defended, Joins Virginia State University

link.title: Congratulations Dr. Simeon Ogunbunmi — Ph.D. Defended, Joins Virginia State University

entry.content: :fireworks: :sparkles: :smile: Congratulations to Dr. Simeon Ogunbunmi, who successfully defended his Ph.D. dissertation and has joined Virginia State University as a Research Associate!
entry.summary: :fireworks: :sparkles: :smile: Congratulations to Dr. Simeon Ogunbunmi, who successfully defended his Ph.D. dissertation and has joined Virginia State University as a Research Associate!

entry.title: CerVaLens Project Awarded SUNY Technology Accelerator Fund Grant

link.title: CerVaLens Project Awarded SUNY Technology Accelerator Fund Grant

entry.content: :fireworks: The CerVaLens project has been awarded a SUNY Technology Accelerator Fund (TAF) grant, with Dr. Chen as PI!
entry.summary: :fireworks: The CerVaLens project has been awarded a SUNY Technology Accelerator Fund (TAF) grant, with Dr. Chen as PI!

entry.title: Congratulations Dr. Qian Qu — Ph.D. Defended, Joins Virginia State University

link.title: Congratulations Dr. Qian Qu — Ph.D. Defended, Joins Virginia State University

entry.content: :fireworks: :sparkles: :smile: Congratulations to Dr. Qian Qu, who successfully defended his Ph.D. dissertation and has joined Virginia State University as a tenure-track Assistant Professor in Computer Science!
entry.summary: :fireworks: :sparkles: :smile: Congratulations to Dr. Qian Qu, who successfully defended his Ph.D. dissertation and has joined Virginia State University as a tenure-track Assistant Professor in Computer Science!

entry.title: Congratulations Dr. Nihal Poredi — Ph.D. Defended, Joins Virginia State University

link.title: Congratulations Dr. Nihal Poredi — Ph.D. Defended, Joins Virginia State University

entry.content: :fireworks: :sparkles: :smile: Congratulations to Dr. Nihal Poredi, who successfully defended his Ph.D. dissertation and has joined Virginia State University as an Assistant Professor in Computer Science!
entry.summary: :fireworks: :sparkles: :smile: Congratulations to Dr. Nihal Poredi, who successfully defended his Ph.D. dissertation and has joined Virginia State University as an Assistant Professor in Computer Science!
